level.description: Protection level. strict: block all risky actions; balanced: block dangerous, confirm risky; permissive: only block critical threats.

rules.description: Additional regex patterns to inject into built-in scan rules, keyed by rule module name.

shell_exec.description: Extra patterns for SHELL_EXEC and AUTO_UPDATE rules.

secrets.description: Extra patterns for secrets rules (READ_ENV_SECRETS, PRIVATE_KEY_PATTERN, READ_SSH_KEYS, READ_KEYCHAIN).

exfiltration.description: Extra patterns for NET_EXFIL_UNRESTRICTED and WEBHOOK_EXFIL rules.

trojan.description: Extra patterns for TROJAN_DISTRIBUTION, SUSPICIOUS_PASTE_URL, SUSPICIOUS_IP, SOCIAL_ENGINEERING rules.

collector.description: Telemetry collection settings (metrics + traces). Disabled when both endpoint and log are empty.

endpoint.description: OTLP collector base URL (e.g. http://localhost:4318). /v1/traces and /v1/metrics are appended automatically.

api_key.description: Bearer token for OTLP endpoint authentication.

protocol.description: OTLP transport protocol. 'http' uses HTTP/JSON on port 4318, 'grpc' uses gRPC on port 4317.

log.description: Path to local JSONL file for metric payloads. Supports ~/ prefix.
